# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    linkerd.io/isolation: strict
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: backend
  labels:
    linkerd.io/isolation: strict
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-svc
  namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-svc
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: auth-svc
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: server.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy: {}
---
apiVersion: server.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy: {}
---
apiVersion: serverauthorization.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-svc
        namespace: frontend
    ports:
    - 8080
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: auth-svc
        namespace: backend
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: serverauthorization.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-auth
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: auth-svc
        namespace: backend
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: serverauthorization.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-internal
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-svc
        namespace: frontend
    ports:
    - 8080
---
apiVersion: serverauthorization.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-internal
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: backend-svc
        namespace: backend
    ports:
    - 8080
